facebook.caption: POV: you drove past the resort strip and ended up at Rak Rock Lobster in Cửa Lấp. 4.8 stars. 675 reviews. Fresh lobster pulled straight from the water. This is the Phu Quoc seafood meal you came for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Lobster cracking open. Butter dripping. Cửa Lấp waterfront behind you. Rak Rock Lobster is doing things the tourist strip isn't. 4.8 stars, 675 reviews. Go.
